# opnsense_haproxy_action (Data Source)

Reads an existing HAProxy action on OPNsense by UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `deny_status` (Number) HTTP status code for deny actions.
- `description` (String) Description of the HAProxy action.
- `http_request_option` (String) Raw HAProxy option text for HTTP request actions.
- `linked_acls` (Set of String) Set of HAProxy ACL UUIDs used as conditions.
- `map_use_backend_default` (String) Default backend UUID for map_use_backend actions.
- `mapfile` (String) Map file UUID for map_use_backend actions.
- `name` (String) Name of the HAProxy action.
- `operator` (String) How multiple linked ACLs are combined.
- `redirect` (String) Redirect rule text.
- `set_header_content` (String) Header value for set-header actions.
- `set_header_name` (String) Header name for set-header actions.
- `test_type` (String) ACL match polarity: 'if' or 'unless'.
- `type` (String) Action type.
- `use_backend` (String) Backend UUID for use_backend actions.
